overview: Vivah Setu (विवाह सेतू) is a premium matrimony platform exclusively for the Digambar Jain community, offering profile browsing, smart matching with Kundali Milan, secure UPI payments, multilingual support (Marathi, Hindi, Kannada, English), and a feature-rich admin panel.
features: Kundali Milan ashtakoot matching (36 points, 8 gunas)
AI help desk chatbot in 4 languages
Secure admin panel with triple authentication
AI-designed Jain logo with Namaste symbol
